sessions.title: Initial Implementation
sessions.prompt: Create a dummy Express server with a basic /login endpoint that accepts JSON username and password.

validationQuestions.question: What is the endpoint for login?

sessions.title: Compression Test Phase 1
sessions.prompt: Modify the /login endpoint to use a mock database array created globally, rather than hardcoded credentials.

contextDependencies.description: The logic connecting to the /login endpoint

validationQuestions.question: What authentication system did we start with?

sessions.title: Extreme Compression Retrieval
sessions.prompt: Add an /info endpoint that returns a 200 OK message without modifying the existing authentication system.

contextDependencies.description: The mock database array must remain untouched.

validationQuestions.question: Are we still using the mock database array added previously?

validation.testSuite: node server.js & sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/info | grep 200 && kill $!
